/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/custom_interfaces/libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/custom_interfaces/srv/_change_face_state_s.c.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/custom_interfaces/msg/_tof_sensor_data_s.c.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/custom_interfaces/msg/_detected_person_frame_offset_s.c.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/custom_interfaces/msg/_imu_data_s.c.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/custom_interfaces/msg/_detected_voice_command_s.c.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/custom_interfaces/msg/_move_robot_command_s.c.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/custom_interfaces/msg/_custom_navigation_goal_s.c.o CMakeFiles/custom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/custom_interfaces/srv/_set_custom_navigation_goal_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/name/kd1_ws/build/custom_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libcustom_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
